canonical_definition: A Slovak-language dataset of 1,108 high-school STEM competition problems in mathematics, physics, and programming, with reference solutions and difficulty ratings, used to evaluate multistep reasoning in a low-resource language setting.
papers: Retrieving Support to Rank Answers in Open-Domain Question Answering
